#USA #Kansas #Ottawa #Tornado #climate #destruction #anomaly #climatechange

🇺🇸 On April 14, 2026 tornado left significant damage in Ottawa (Kansas, USA).

The storm destroyed houses and farm buildings, uprooted trees, and downed power lines. Reports noted power outages and transportation disruptions
